chapter_title.en: Chapter on Emancipation and Its Rulings

text: 3445 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "لاَ طَلاَقَ قَبْلَ نِكَاحٍ وَ لاَ عِتْقَ قَبْلَ مِلْكٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3445 - The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace be upon him and his family, said:
"There is no divorce before marriage, and there is no emancipation before ownership."
